summary: Good audience recording of a varied first set with standout Dark Star and Estimated Prophet > Blow Away sequences
review: The reviewer praises the mix of tunes in the first set, highlighting the placement of Foolish (Heart) and Victim, and especially remembers the Dark Star and the Estimated Prophet > Blow Away sequence. The recording is described as “pretty good for an audience recording,” indicating solid sound quality despite being sourced from the crowd.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed review gives a strong positive impression of both performance and audio, but limited sample size keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience recording described as pretty good; no major flaws noted, though typical crowd ambience is implied.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes a solid first‑set flow with good song placement, especially praising Foolish (Heart) and Victim.
